home.title: Premium Afghan Dry Fruits
home.subtitle: Discover carefully selected raisins, figs, apricots, mulberries and other Afghan specialities, packed with care and delivered across Germany.
home.storyBody: Our confirmed sourcing examples span figs from Kandahar, peaches from Logar, raisins from Kabul and mulberries from Shamali.
home.newsletterBody: Receive product arrivals, recipes and gifting ideas. Optional subscription, unsubscribe at any time.
